places.name: Antikythera Mechanism
places.description: A 2,000-year-old computer demonstrates remarkable engineering and astronomical precision.

places.name: The Athenian Agora
places.description: This ancient Greek place of assembly and marketplace is being revealed layer by layer below the modern Athens cityscape.

places.name: Lycabettus Funicular
places.description: The railway carts travelers to central Athens's highest peak, which offers stunning vistas of the city.

places.name: Anafiotika
places.description: The Cycladic architecture makes this Athens neighborhood feel like an island paradise hidden in the shadow of the Acropolis.

places.name: Hadrian's Reservoir
places.description: This ancient hydrological marvel is now the base of a modern outdoor cinema.

places.name: Magic Sphere of Helios
places.description: This mystical orb covered in strange symbols is thought to have been used in ancient Greek magical rituals.

places.name: Theatre of Dionysus
places.description: Heralded as the world's first theater, these ruins are often overlooked as they reside in the shadows of the Acropolis.

places.name: The Olive Tree of the Acropolis
places.description: Legend says this sacred tree was a gift from goddess Athena.

places.name: Diporto
places.description: With no menu and no sign, this 130-year-old taverna doles out affordable home cooking.

places.name: Kafeneio Oraia Ellas
places.description: Luminaries of all stripes have sipped strong Greek coffee at this cafe since 1839.
